keyTerms.predictive maintenance: AI-driven monitoring that forecasts equipment failures days or weeks in advance using sensor data patterns
keyTerms.computer vision inspection: Deep-learning systems that detect microscopic manufacturing defects at production-line speed without fatigue
keyTerms.generative design: AI algorithms that produce thousands of optimized part geometries from a set of engineering constraints
keyTerms.collaborative robots: Robots designed to work alongside humans rather than in isolated cages, combining machine precision with human oversight
keyTerms.digital twin: A real-time virtual replica of a physical system used for simulation, prediction, and optimization
